nodes.description: 'Yes! This'll be fun! Right?'  Sideshow and Good Smile Arts Shanghai are excited to present Star Guardian Zoe from the globally popular esports game 'League of Legends!'   The impressively sized figure features detailed sculpting of Zoe's long flowing hair, her Portal Jump ability, and more! Her hair and the magic effect parts have been created with the use of translucent parts.  Be sure to add Star Guardian Zoe to your collection today!
nodes.name: Star Guardian Zoe

nodes.description: Super7's latest wave of Disney ULTIMATES! presented by Sideshow has a little something for everyone! With Ben AliGator from Disney's Fantasia, Stitch from Disney's Lilo & Stitch, Disney Silly Symphony's The Big Bad Wolf, and The Queen of Hearts from Disney's Alice in Wonderland, there's an ULTIMATES! figure for fans of vintage shorts, animated classics, and beloved modern movies! These 7' scale highly-articulated, made-to-order figures come with interchangeable parts and additional must-have accessories, making them the ultimate collectible for any Disney fan!  We hope you planted the red roses instead of the white ones because The Queen of Hearts is here and such mistakes can have dire consequences! This 7 scale, highly articulated, intricately designed ULTIMATES! figure of The Queen of Hearts from Disney's Alice in Wonderland is accompanied by the King of Hearts and includes multiple interchangeable heads& hands as well as a variety of accessories. Don't lose your head! Be sure to order your made-to-order Disney ULTIMATES! Queen of Hearts figure and turn your collection into a Wonderland!
nodes.name: Queen of Hearts

nodes.description: From My Hero Academia , comes the first three-dimensional hero suit with a cool girl Kyoka Jiro who is a rock enthusiast from the first-grader of U.A. High School. She has the quirk of an earphone jack that attacks with sound waves. In order to express her quirk, Bellfine made a figure with a pedestal with effect parts and American-style character parts.  Sonic effect parts can be removed and you can choose between a cool expression that is her charm and a smiling expression.   Be sure to add this cool girl collectible figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Kyoka Jiro (Hero Suit Version)

nodes.description: Super7's latest wave of Disney ULTIMATES! presented by Sideshow has a little something for everyone! With Ben AliGator from Disney's Fantasia, Stitch from Disney's Lilo & Stitch, Disney Silly Symphony's The Big Bad Wolf, and The Queen of Hearts from Disney's Alice in Wonderland, there's an ULTIMATES! figure for fans of vintage shorts, animated classics, and beloved modern movies! These 7' scale highly-articulated, made-to-order figures come with interchangeable parts and additional must-have accessories, making them the ultimate collectible for any Disney fan!  As Ben Ali Gator discovers, while wooing Hyacinth Hippo, even if things don't go as smoothly as a well-executed ballet, an earnest and enthusiastic effort with a certain panache can win the day. This 7 scale, highly articulated, intricately designed ULTIMATES! figure of Ben Ali Gator from Disney's Fantasia features a soft goods cape and includes multiple interchangeable heads & hands. Love can be found in the most unlikely of places, but we think it's highly likely you'll love to add this made-to-order Disney ULTIMATES! figure of Ben Ali Gator to your collection!
nodes.name: Ben Ali Gator

nodes.description: From TV anime, My Hero Academia , three-dimensional Himiko Toga from the enemy villain alliance! Himiko Toga's quirk is she can transform into a person by ingesting another person's blood.  Armed parts such as syringes and knives for ingesting blood are partly magnetized and can be removed. Characteristic sharp canines and delicate eyes are attractively reproduced, and bloody effect parts placed on the pedestal and three-dimensional sound effects further enhance her charm.  Be sure to add this collectible figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Himiko Toga

nodes.description: Following the launch of the acclaimed cat and mouse quirky figures and bowling figures, Soap Studio is proud to present the third installment in the series, the Vase Tom and Roly-Poly Jerry Collectible Set! The lovable duo is no stranger when it comes to accomplishing elaborate transformations, and this comically witty set is no exception!  Tom is transformed into a vase, with two cross-eyed eyes and funny eyebrows, just begging you to try to put on the same funny expression. His cocked mouth and hands on his hips seem to relay his frequent dissatisfaction with Jerry, who unsurprisingly appears to be making fun of him.  As an added bonus, Tom's vase is hollow inside, allowing you to use it as storage, where it will definitely become the most eye-catching pen holder on your desk!  Wanting in on the fun, we see Jerry has turned into a roly-poly tumbler, with a round head and cute eyes that make people feel sympathetic and playful. With his two little hands close to the body, it's impossible to not want to laugh and reach out to hold him close! When you feel troubled, just push Jerry lightly and make yourself happy with the wobble-wobble that ensues!!  This mood-enhancing set will bring fun into your collection! Collect Tom and Jerry today!
nodes.name: Vase Tom and Roly-Poly Jerry

nodes.description: 'We work in the dark, to serve the light. We are Assassins.'  From 'Assassin's Creed II' comes a Nendoroid of the main character, Ezio! The Nendoroid comes with three face plates including a face shrouded in darkness, a combat face, and a smiling face. His Hidden Blade, the Apple of Eden, the Sword of Altaïr, a feather for his brother, and a haystack papercraft are all included as optional parts.  Be sure to add this adorable version of the strongest assassin to your collection today!
nodes.name: Ezio Auditore Nendoroid

nodes.description: Sideshow and Lladró are proud to present the Ahsoka Tano Porcelain Statue!  From Lladró's Star Wars Premier Collection, this statue has a matt porcelain finish with some metallic and iridescent effects. It stands at 22' tall and is decorated with the characteristic colors of the character. The non-porcelain elements are Ahsoka's white lightsabers, which are represented with two fluorescent glass rods of 7.87' and 11.81'. The black base included with the sculpture is made of wood.  Be sure to order your Ahsoka Tano Porcelain Statue today!
nodes.name: Ahsoka Tano

nodes.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Kyojuro Rengoku (Shake The Sword Burn Your Heart) Statue!  This statue is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Kyojuro Rengoku from Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. Standing at approximately 6.3' tall, Kyojuro is seen here ready to strike in this dynamic and exciting statue.  Demon Slayer fans, be sure to enhance your collection with the Kyojuro Rengoku statue today!

nodes.description: STAR WARS: VISIONS™, an anthology of animated short films celebrates Star Wars through the lens of the world's best anime creators and storytellers. Seven Japanese anime studios bring their unique talent and perspective to this cutting edge series now streaming only on Disney+.   THE DUEL, an animated short by studio Kamikaze Douga, captivates audiences with groundbreaking visuals and intense action.   Character designs for THE DUEL were overseen by illustrator Takeshi Okazaki, who also worked on the concept for the Artist Series TUSKEN RAIDER™ ARTFX.   The mysterious RONIN, a former Sith™ warrior, wanders through the Outer Rim territories with his trusty astromech droid B5-B6™. Upon a chance encounter with a group of bandits and their leader attacking a defenseless village on the planet Genbara™, the Ronin is thrust back into battle and becomes an unlikely savior for those in need.   Masterfully sculpted in 1/7 scale the Ronin stands in a stoic pose brandishing a lightsaber aglow with vibrant red from the embedded Kyber Crystal™. Every detail from the Ronin's character design has been painstakingly replicated down to the prosthetic jaw support, his arsenal of two lightsabers and blaster, and the billowing robes of his attire, which were designed to resemble those of a kimono in Japanese culture.   Do not miss this opportunity to add the Ronin, a unique limited production ARTFX to your Star Wars collection!
nodes.name: The Ronin

nodes.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Monkey D. Luffy (Duel Memories) Statue!   This statue is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Monkey D. Luffy from the hit anime One Piece. Standing at approximately 4.7' tall, Monkey D. Luffy is seen striking their familiar and iconic pose.   One Piece fans, be sure to enhance your anime figure collection with the Monkey D. Luffy statue today!
nodes.name: Monkey D. Luffy (Duel Memories)

nodes.description: Disney comes home for the holidays with this festive Disney collectible by Jim Shore!  Attempting to help his Ohana decorate, Stitch gets caught up in Christmas preparations. Tangled in lights, the little alien tries to escape while wearing a Santa hat.  Join the holiday fun, and add Stitch to your Disney collection today!
nodes.name: Stitch Wrapped in Christmas Lights

nodes.description: Enesco is proud to present the delightful Miss Mindy Jack and Sally Figurine! These lovebirds were crafted with the adorable and recognizable Miss Mindy treatment, seemingly further entwined by the tail of Zero hovering at their feet.  Not just an enjoyable Disney collectible for Halloween or Christmas time, this Miss Mindy Jack Skellington and Sally figurine is sure to please all seasons!
nodes.name: Miss Mindy Jack and Sally

nodes.description: Christmas Town just got spookier!  Disney collectibles come home for the holidays with this festive Santa Jack figurine By Enesco as part of the Disney Showcase line. Jack Skellington is ready to spread joy with his sack full of handmade gifts sure to delight young and old alike......perhaps!
nodes.name: Santa Jack

nodes.description: This enchanting Winnie the Pooh statuette showcases the Hundred Acre Wood crew in stunning detail. Pooh, Piglet, Rabbit, Tigger, Owl, and Eeyore gather outside Pooh's house. Covered in astonishing patchwork detail, this Disney collectible is unmistakably Jim Shore!  Disney fans and friends, come snuggle up with the Pooh Carved by Heart Figurine today!
nodes.name: Pooh Carved by Heart

nodes.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Charlotte Katakuri (Duel Memories) Statue!   This statue of the Charlotte family's skilled fighter was expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Charlotte Katakuri from the hit anime One Piece. Standing at approximately 3.9' tall, Charlotte Katakuri is seen striking a powerful and dynamic pose.  One Piece fans, be sure to enhance your collection with the Charlotte Katakuri statue today!
nodes.name: Charlotte Katakuri (Duel Memories)

nodes.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Donquixote Doflamingo (Duel Memories) Statue!  This statue of 'Heavenly Yaksha' is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Donquixote Doflamingo from the hit anime One Piece. Standing at approximately 3.5' tall, Donquixote Doflamingo is seen striking their popular and iconic pose.   One Piece fans, be sure to enhance your collection with the Donquixote Doflamingo statue today!
nodes.name: Donquixote Doflamingo (Duel Memories)

nodes.description: A limited edition of 500 individually numbered pieces worldwide.  Luke, already reeling from a catastrophic injury dealt by Vader, finally faces what he now realizes to be a terrible but undeniable truth. Only one choice presents itself to the young Skywalker.  Crucial elements stand out in stark contrast against the somber matte black of the maintenance platform, focussing all attention on this pivotal moment in 1980's Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back.
nodes.name: Luke vs Darth Vader

nodes.description: Sideshow and Dark Horse Comics are excited to present the Adam Smasher Figure!  Smasher is a towering cyborg, with little empathy or humanity left to be seen. After being blasted by an RPG, the Arasaka Corporation retrieved what was left of him and replaced what was missing with machinery. Now working as their muscle, he lives to repay them by killing any and all enemies of the corporation. This impressive figure stands above the rest at approximately 12 tall including his larger base to incorporate his massive size!  Don't miss your chance to add this cyborg figure to your collection!
nodes.name: Adam Smasher

nodes.description: Sideshow and Dark Horse Comics are excited to present the Panam Palmer Figure!  If you think Night City is dangerous, just wait 'till you get to the Badlands. No one knows this more than ex-nomad of the Aldecaldo family, Panam Palmer. Locked in a bitter feud with the current tribe leader, she left to try her luck as a merc in Night City. Panam has her hands full as she fights for a better future for herself and those she cares about. This beautifully detailed figure stands approximately 9 including base.  Don't miss your chance to add this beautiful figure to your collection!
nodes.name: Panam Palmer

nodes.description: Sideshow and Dark Horse Comics are excited to present the Judy Alvarez Figure!  As Night City's premier braindance technician, Judy could have lived the life of luxury working for any corporation she wanted. Instead, she valued her independence too much to sell out, she instead set up shop in Lizzie's Bar and became a member of the Mox Gang. Her anarchist spirit drew her to Mox in the hope that they could improve the lives of people in Night City. Judy stands approximately 9 tall including base.   Don't miss your chance to add this beautiful figure to your collection!
nodes.name: Judy Alvarez

nodes.description: The greatest heroes and heroines of all time in the DC Universe are returning in their most iconic outfits and coolest form of transportation in the next CosRider collection presented by Sideshow and Hot Toys. Based on a series of highly-acclaimed DC theatrical releases, this CosRider is tuned up with metallic painting details, including Wonder Woman riding a horse from Wonder Woman!  This Wonder Woman collectible features functions such as coin-operated mechanical design, original music tune, LED light-up function, and built-in rocking motion. CosRider in the same series can be coupled up and rock together to a fun original tune. Each collectible in the series measures approximately 13 – 14cm tall.  Rock your DC display with our latest CosRider collection now!
nodes.name: Wonder Woman

nodes.description: It's not just a signal; it's a warning. –Batman  Keep an eye out for the Bat-Signal! Focused on the early years of the Caped Crusader's rise of crime-fighting, DC's next blockbuster The Batman will offer the younger version of Batman who swore to take a stand against the forces of evil. To prepare fans for the movie's official release, Sideshow and Hot Toys presents a new series of Cosbaby that recreates your favorite characters as stylish displays! Each Cosbaby stands approximately 9–12.5cm tall with a rotatable head.  The Batman (Comic Color Version) Cosbaby Collectible Figure brings forth the hero donning comic-inspired colors specially applied with luminous reflective effects. The luminous reflective effect can be activated by UV black light torch (not included).  Join the fight with The Batman Cosbaby DC collection!
nodes.name: Batman (Comic Color Version)

nodes.description: It's not just a signal; it's a warning. –Batman  Keep an eye out for the Bat-Signal! nodes.name: Be@rbrick Squid Game Frontman 1000%

Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Squid Game Guard (Square) 1000% Collectible Figure!  Standing approximately 27.5 inches tall, this Be@rbrick features the cryptic Square-masked Guard, ready to enforce rules and report to the Front Man of your collection.  Squid Game fans, you surely won't want to miss out on this!

nodes.description: A new version of the colorful hero of 'Mighty Thor,' featuring 'new method' sculpting and Tamashii digital coloring for a lifelike appearance! In addition to a face so accurate we had to clear the portraiture rights with Chris Hemsworth, a powerful-looking Stormbreaker, lightning effect parts, and a cape with internal wires for posability make this Thor collectible one of the most dynamic portrayals of the hero ever made!  Add to your Marvel collection!
nodes.name: Thor

nodes.description: A new version of the Jane Foster from 'Mighty Thor,' featuring 'new method' sculpting and Tamashii digital coloring for a lifelike appearance! In addition to a face so accurate we had to clear the portraiture rights with Natalie Portman, it includes a cracked Mjolnir hammer and numerous effect parts, plus a cape with internal wires for posability!  Add to your Marvel collection!
nodes.name: Mighty Thor

nodes.description: Sideshow and First 4 Figures are proud to present the latest Castlevania statue - Death!  The highly detailed Death statue is inspired by the scene in the game where Alucard meets Death for the first time upon entering Dracula's castle. Death was wielding his scythe over his shoulder as he was pointing at Alucard during their confrontation, and just like in the game, Death is a cloaked floating skeleton with half of his body missing, which is accurately represented in this statue!   To bring this iconic scene to life, even more, we chose Dracula's castle floors as the design of the base since this is where Alucard and Death had their first encounter. To further enhance its details, weathering effects were added to the base to portray the castle's very old age!  Castlevania fans, don't miss your chance to add this statue to your collection today!
nodes.name: Death (Standard Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Paragon FX Group are proud to present The Goonies Adventure Collection Prop Replica.   You're gonna need the proper equipment if you plan on finding One-Eyed Willy's treasure and Paragon FX Group has made things easy by putting it all in one complete set for you. Yep, everything - It's all right here!  'The Goonies Adventure Collection' includes The Copper Bones Key, The Spanish Doubloon, and of course, Willy's Treasure Map.  Fully licensed by Warner Bros. and Amblin, the prop makers at Paragon began their research for this collection by looking at The Copper Bones Key. Numerous versions that are purported to be from production have surfaced over the years. In the end, we were greatly inspired by a surviving key that remains with a prominent actor from the film. The decision was then made to cast this piece in metal and finish with a proper patina, befitting of a relic of its age and origin.   The Spanish Doubloon is also cast in metal and was sized from an original prop. As with the key, the proper patina ensures this piece becomes a cherished part of your collection.  Finally, the map. After extensive research, Amblin provided Paragon FX Group with the reference for Willy's map. A surviving map that was given away as a 'wrap gift' at the film's completion serves as the base for this replica. As with the original, additional text and misc. indicia was added to complete the replica which is offered here on quality parchment-like paper.  This 3-piece set will be limited to 1500 units worldwide. A must-have set for any fan of The Goonies.
nodes.name: The Goonies Adventure Collection

nodes.description: In ancient lore, a banshee is a female spirit that wails outside a house as a warning that death will occur soon.   Sideshow Art Print and Ozone Productions present the Banshee Fine Art Print, a monstrously beautiful pinup by renowned artist Olivia De Berardinis.  This banshee's a total scream! Model Julie Strain embodies Olivia's ethereal emissary of death in this detailed illustration. Originally created in 1996 to promote Olivia's own Stiletto Heroes art exhibition and later seen gracing the cover of Heavy Metal Magazine, the silvery spirit is a sure sign of terror to those who hear her cries. Her blackened wings and sharpened attire show she's no angel, and a skeletal serpent tattoo adds an extra layer of deadliness to her appearance.  Each Banshee Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia and includes both her official embossed Seal of Authenticity and a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of only 175 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this badass beauty is a must-have for fans of pinup art, fierce femmes, and Olivia's dazzling creations.  If you hear her call, there's no fighting fate — bring home the Banshee Fine Art Print by Olivia De Berardinis today!
nodes.name: Banshee

nodes.description: Sideshow Art Prints and Ozone Productions present the Bettie Page's Eyes Fine Art Print, a quintessential pinup piece by renowned artist Olivia De Berardinis. This Sideshow Exclusive color variant is a highly collectible addition to any home gallery.  Olivia pays tribute to the one-of-a-kind pinup pioneer Bettie Page in this dazzling composition that is big on hair and even bigger on personality! Shining pink ribbons add a burst of color against Page's volumized pin curls as she gazes at the viewer, a mischievous smile on her lips. The variant's unique blue and yellow gradient background adds a sunrise softness to this seductive portrait celebrating the iconic model's enduring appeal.  Each Bettie Page's Eyes Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia and includes both her official embossed Seal of Authenticity and a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of only 175 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this is must-have pinup artwork for Olivia collectors and Bettie Page fans alike.  This one's worth a second glance — don't miss your chance to bring home the Sideshow Exclusive Bettie Page's Eyes Fine Art Print by Olivia De Berardinis!
nodes.name: Bettie Page's Eyes

nodes.description: Let's keep moving. Victory is at hand.   Sideshow Art Prints and Alex Ross Art present the Captain America: Man Out of Time Fine Art Lithograph, a Marvel art print for fans of the first Avenger.  Out of the ice and into the fight! This energetic illustration by renowned comic book artist Alex Ross celebrates the classic action and adventures of Captain America. Dressed in his vintage wings and scaled armor, the Star-Spangled Man with a Plan races through enemy fire on a roaring motorcycle, leaving only smoke and the sight of his shield in his wake. Steve Rogers has become an all-around American icon, timeless in his own right as he proudly dons the red, white, and blue across the ages in his fight for justice.  Originally created as a variant cover for Captain America #700 (2018), a milestone issue written by Mark Waid for Marvel Comics, this comic book wall art is available to fans in a collectible format exclusively through Sideshow. Each Captain America: Man Out of Time Fine Art Lithograph is hand-signed by Alex Ross and includes a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 200 pieces, making this a must-have for Marvel collectors.   Keep your Avengers collection moving forward towards freedom with the Captain America: Man Out of Time Fine Art Lithograph by Alex Ross.
nodes.name: Captain America: Man Out of Time

nodes.description: I made a vow to have peace, no matter how many people I have to kill to get it. – Peacemaker  Picking up where 2021's The Suicide Squad left off, DC's recently released series Peacemaker follows a violent vigilante who believes in achieving peace at any cost - no matter how many people he has to kill for it in the process. He was one of the members of the second Task Force X strike team sent on a mission to Coro Maltese.  In response to the immense fame of the character, Sideshow and Hot Toys are pleased to officially introduce the highly-anticipated Peacemaker Sixth Scale Collectible Figure with shiny silver chrome helmets from the Peacemaker collection.  Sophisticatedly crafted with striking likeness of Peacemaker's appearance portrayed by John Cena in the action series, the 1/6th scale figure features a newly developed helmet head and an interchangeable helmet covered in silver chrome finish with details, an attachable tongue to create alternate expressions, a specially tailored outfit, weapons including a sword, an axe, and a figure stand. The sidekick of the show - Eagly will also come as a sixth sixth scale accessory with spread wings for a complete collector experience.   Be sure to pick up the fantastic Peacemaker Sixth Scale Collectible Figure now to add to your proud DC collection!
nodes.name: Peacemaker

nodes.description: From the extremely popular 80's anime Voltron: Defender of the Universe comes the ROBO-DOU Voltron Collectible Figure!   threezero's engineers have worked effortlessly to re-create the classic mecha Voltron in a presentation never before seen! The ROBO-DOU Voltron is designed to achieve a wider range of articulation and better-combining functions than its contemporaries while maintaining the robot's iconic retro aesthetic.   Accurately simulating its appearance on-screen, ROBO-DOU Voltron is a non-scale, fully-articulated figure standing approximately 10.6 tall in Voltron mode with a remarkable die-cast mainframe and an impressive metallic finish to highlight the details of the mecha. Voltron is composed of five Lion mecha and is able to split into Lion mode or combine to form Voltron. All five Lion mechas are fully-articulated figures partly adopting zinc alloy and metal parts for the movable joints. Combined, the figure utilizes 124 points of articulation for a total of five machines, with a set of Voltron mode weapons in addition to a unique set of weapons for each Lion.
nodes.name: ROBO-DOU Voltron

This DC Collectible Batman Statue is limited edition and based on the references from Zack Snyder's Justice League. nodes.description: Unlock the universe! This screen-accurate collection of highly-detailed, hand-painted models will capture the most famous starships and vehicles from the beloved science-fiction franchise, Stargate. Spanning three TV series, Stargate tells the story of human explorers embarking on near-instantaneous travel across the cosmos to study new worlds, alien cultures, and advanced civilizations.  As the primary attack fighters of the powerful Goa'uld empire, Death Gliders have patrolled the Milky Way galaxy for thousands of years. Capable of both atmospheric and deep space flight, the sight and unique, terrifying sound of swarms of these ships has signaled planetary invasion and spread fear across the stars. The simple, strong crescent structure of the Death Glider contains a cockpit fit for two-a pilot and a gunner- although the ships are often flown by a single warrior. Each glider is equipped with an external loudspeaker to intimidate and control enemies of the empire, as well as more traditional weaponry in the shape of wing-mounted staff cannons.
nodes.name: Death Glider

nodes.description: Sculpted in solid sterling silver, The Mandalorian's Din Djarin's Mudhorn clan signet is reversible – choose to wear the engraved motto 'Clan of Two' facing outward for all to see or hidden privately against the body. Sleek and simple, with antiquing to emphasize contrast, the pendant hangs from a heavy adjustable 24-inch sterling silver curb chain.  This Star Wars X RockLove jewelry design is Limited Edition. Every Star Wars X RockLove piece arrives in a signature Star Wars X RockLove Collector's Box, with an embossed exterior and metallic silkscreened art inside. The two fitted pieces to stack, with the jewelry mounted in a theatrical widescreen proscenium, compelling addition to any display case.  Star Wars fans don't miss your chance to add this beautiful piece of jewelry to your collection!
nodes.name: Mudhorn Clan of Two Pendant

nodes.description: You see, in this world there's two kinds of people, my friend: Those with loaded guns and those who dig. You dig.   Sideshow presents The Man with No Name Sixth Scale Figure, the debut figure of the Clint Eastwood Legacy Collection celebrating the actor's extensive career in film.  Based on Clint Eastwood's appearance in Sergio Leone's essential spaghetti Western film The Good, The Bad and the Ugly, The Man with No Name Sixth Scale Figure features a meticulously crafted, steely-eyed portrait with a non-removable hat and cigar. Called Blondie by Tuco, the mysterious drifter wears a custom-tailored fabric costume including a dress shirt, pants, a pistol belt with holster, a faux leather vest with faux fur lining, a neckerchief, and a removable serape.  The Man with No Name Sixth Scale Figure is articulated to allow for numerous display options utilizing the accompanying additional hands and accessories. This bounty hunter's tools of the trade include a pistol with an embossed snake grip design, a large rifle, a rock, and spurs on the heels of his boots. The figure also comes with nine hands in total — a pair of fists, a pair of relaxed hands, a pair of gesturing hands, a right rifle-holding hand, a left rifle-supporting hand, and a right pistol-holding hand. Craft dynamic and dramatic poses for the gunslinger on your shelf of Western collectibles and pay tribute to this iconic figure in cinema.  If you've got a fistful of dollars burning a hole in your pocket be sure to bring home The Man with No Name Sixth Scale Figure from Sideshow's Clint Eastwood Legacy Collection today.
nodes.name: The Man With No Name

nodes.description: I see the Padawan needs one … last … lesson!   Sideshow presents the Ahsoka Tano™ vs Darth Maul™ Diorama, a dramatic new Star Wars™ collectible spotlighting an iconic lightsaber duel between two fan-favorite characters.  Inspired by their fateful confrontation in Star Wars: The Clone Wars™, the Ahsoka Tano vs Darth Maul Diorama measures 20 tall and 14.55 wide, set against a Mandalore™ throne room environment base. Shattered windows and scorch marks on the throne set the scene of a high-octane battle in progress, as the ex-Padawan™ and former Sith™ go toe to toe in a graceful, skillful clash of Force-wielding ideals and lightsaber blades.  The polystone Ahsoka Tano vs Darth Maul Diorama features two fully sculpted figures with detailed costumes and paint application based on their animated appearances. Darth Maul's design includes his signature black and red Zabrak™ markings, a horned portrait, a black and brown bodysuit, and cybernetic legs. As a Togruta™, Ahsoka Tano has an orange complexion with white facial markings, her white and blue montrals™ and lekku™, and she wears a blue costume with silver armor accents. The duo's unique lightsaber blades are sculpted with a sweeping visual effect to give the impression of active movement as they duel their way through the Mandalorian™ chamber. Packed with power and personality, this Star Wars diorama is a must-have centerpiece for any fan's shelf.  Bring the epic battle from Mandalore to your Star Wars collection with the Ahsoka Tano vs Darth Maul Diorama today.
nodes.name: Ahsoka Tano vs Darth Maul

nodes.description: From the movie Godzilla vs. Gigan (released in 1972) comes a Deforeal of the cyborg monster Gigan! The large, claw-like arms and saws on the abdomen are deformed, but with fine detailing to recreate Gigan's characteristic design! You can enjoy the atmosphere of the play by posing her with her arms raised wide. Please enjoy the vicious monster, created by the M Space Hunter Nebula Aliens, Gigan!
nodes.name: Gigan (1972)

nodes.description: The light is hopeIt exists where all life existsSometimes it burns, sometimes it shinesIt contains this warmth and tendernessI am Glimmery KandelI have many stories to tell youYou just need to pat me and I'll light up your heart  With long battery life, the warm, atmospheric Glimmery Kandel will spend every night with you! Designed by Xiachong as an ethereal collaboration between Infinity Studio's sub-brand The Lab and Way, this enchanting collectible lamp will guide you into dreamland!
nodes.name: Glimmery Kandel

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya proudly present the Fine Art Statue Signature Series curated exclusively by the Kucharek Brothers!  Every detail of the product development process, from character selection to concept illustration, final sculpt, and paint has been painstakingly executed or overseen to the Brother's exacting specifications.   With an impressive career in illustration, sculpting, and product design spanning over 2 decades, brothers Brian and Dennis Kucharek form an unstoppable duo once the creative energy starts flowing. It should come as no surprise that their sculpts are some of the most coveted comic and pop culture releases in collections today.  As the inaugural entry in the Signature Series, the brothers have returned to a character they first sculpted back in 2007: Cable! The time-traveling mutant, who is the son of Scott Summers and Madelyne Pryor is masterfully sculpted in 1:6 scale, standing an impressive 14 inches tall on the remains of Nimrod, an advanced mutant-hunting sentinel. From the intricate details found in Cable's tech organic arm to his formidable arsenal of advanced weaponry including 3 plasma rifles, this is the ultimate representation of the one-time X Force team leader and mutant freedom fighter.  The Fine Art Signature Series featuring the Kucharek Brothers are limited edition, one-time production statues, each with a unique serial number on the base. Made of high-quality resin and meticulously hand-painted, these top-shelf releases are sure to take the spotlight in any collection, big or small.   Don't miss your chance to add this Cable Fine Art Statue to your Marvel collection!
nodes.name: Cable

nodes.description: This is the Master-ring, the One Ring to rule them all. - Gandalf  The Dark Lord Sauron, creator of the One Ring and the Rings of Power stirs once more. Feared throughout the ages of Middle-earth, Sauron ruled from the lands of Mordor and the dreaded Barad-dûr.  Sideshow and PureArts proudly present the first officially licensed Lord of the Rings collectible with the Sauron Art Mask. Carefully sculpted from the movie reference material, the mask is paired with a hyperdetailed fully sculpted Barad-dûr mounting base with LED molten lava effect and the blazing Eye of Sauron.  Don't miss your chance to add this beautifully sculpted Lord of the Rings tribute to your collection!
nodes.name: Sauron Art Mask

nodes.description: Beast Kingdom presents the latest addition to its D-Stage series from the classic film Shrek. Puss in Boots will melt your heart with big watery eyes, signature hat in hand, and boots on his feet. The scene is completed with the Gingerbread Man and a cute Shrek plush doll, all displayed in meticulous detail. It is sure to conjure up many memories as soon as fans lay eyes on it.
nodes.name: Puss in Boots Stage

nodes.description: Regal Robot is proud to present the newest creation in their Separation Collection, the Luke Skywalker™ Hand Magnet!  This magnetic mini sculpture is based on Luke Skywalker's Hand from Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back™… and perhaps the most iconic scene of the entire original trilogy!  Sculpted for Regal Robot by Ralph Sutter and designed, prototyped, and produced in the USA, each magnet is cast in solid resin and hand-painted by Regal Robot's artists in their New York studio with distinctive faux finishes. They ship ready to display.  Add this great new magnet to your collection, home, office, man-cave, or fridge!
nodes.name: Luke Skywalker™ Hand Magnet
